articles.title: Human-Machine Interfaces in Health: A Critical Review and Framework of Human-Centered Design Practices
articles.summary: The design of human-machine interfaces (HMIs) in healthcare is a determining factor for the safety, efficiency, and accessibility of medical technologies worldwide. This article presents a structured review of the scientific and regulatory literature published to 2025, with the main objective of identifying the…
